message:
Round 15: Final optimization attempts (minimal gain)

Results: 634ms → 448ms (measured more accurately)
Gap to rs-bpe: 31ms (7.5%) → Updated: 1.08x slower

Total journey: 3.4s → 448ms (7.6x faster!)

Attempted:
- Aggressive inlining (@call always_inline)
- Memory prefetching
- Manual pointer caching

Result: Minimal 0.5% gain (within noise)

Why: Zig ReleaseFast already optimizes aggressively

Final status:
- PyAOT: 448ms 🥈
- rs-bpe: 417ms ⭐
- Gap: 31ms (7.5%, within engineering margin)

Rankings: 2nd place, beat TokenDagger by 33%, tiktoken by 56%
